payload.answer: I found a relationship conflict for Sara: existing memory says she is your daughter, while the new input says she is your niece. Please choose how to handle it.
repair_options: Replace the existing memory with: Sara is my niece.
Keep the existing memory unchanged: Sara is my daughter.
Keep both relationship facts for now because there may be ambiguity or multiple people named Sara.
Clarify that these refer to different people named Sara, if applicable.
